verdict_reason_external: The engineering layer offers the four-medium denial as a structural analog for contract durability — explicitly framed as additive (the verse names properties of the Self; the engineering analog uses the same structural property to test contract durability). The original verse's literal meaning (weapons do not cut the Self, fire does not burn it, etc.) is preserved in the source pack. The disagreements_among_translators field carries the Shankara/Ramanuja stake (partlessness vs. pervasion). The engineering layer does not claim the verse is fundamentally about software contracts; it offers the four-medium structure as a usable engineering discipline. PASS.
